```
Implement the following changes to the NexFeed application:

---

## AI STOCK INSIGHTS — LIGHT ORANGE CARD, NOT COLLAPSIBLE, AUTO-GENERATED

Add an AI-generated insight section on the Next 10 Days page, positioned BETWEEN the upload area and the Stock Level Preview table.

### LAYOUT

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Upload Area                                             │
│  [Drag & drop or upload file]                            │
│  Dummy 10 Days.xlsx · 20 products · 03/19/2026 04:22 PM │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ✨ AI Stock Insights                        ↻ Refresh   │
│                                                          │
│  20 products analyzed — 15 need production, 2 are stock  │
│  sufficient, and 3 have critical stock levels...         │
│                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Stock Level Preview (20 products)          ↻ Refresh    │
│  [Table]                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

### CONTAINER STYLING

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Background | Light orange (#fff7ed) |
| Border | 1px solid #fed7aa |
| Border radius | 12px |
| Padding | 20px 24px |
| Margin top | 16px (below upload area) |
| Margin bottom | 16px (above stock level preview) |
| Box shadow | None |

---

### HEADER ROW

```
✨ AI Stock Insights                                 ↻ Refresh
```

| Element | Styling |
|---|---|
| ✨ icon | Orange sparkle icon, matching the Smart Production Summary icon style |
| "AI Stock Insights" | 14px, font-weight 700 (bold), dark text (#1a1a1a) |
| "Refresh" button | Orange text (#fd5108), 12px, with refresh icon (↻). Hover: slightly darker orange. Cursor: pointer. |
| Layout | Title on the left, Refresh on the far right, same line |

---

### CONTENT — FLOWING NARRATIVE STYLE

AI-generated insight text sits directly below the header. No bullet cards, no separate sections — a flowing narrative paragraph similar to the Smart Production Summary.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Font size | 12px |
| Text color | Dark grey (#4b5563) |
| Line height | 1.6 |
| Margin top | 8px (below header) |

**The AI generates a concise, flowing narrative covering:**

1. **Overview** — how many products, how many need production, how many stock sufficient, total balance.
2. **Urgent items** — products with target dates within 1-2 days, mentioned by name.
3. **Extended production** — products unlikely to meet target in 10 days.
4. **Stock sufficient** — products that can be deprioritized.
5. **SAP match** — how many products match existing SAP orders (if SAP data exists).

**Example output:**
```
20 products analyzed — 15 need production, 2 are stock 
sufficient, and 3 have critical stock levels. Total balance 
to produce is approximately 620 MT. Gallimax 3 Maintenance 
is the most urgent with a target date of Mar 19 (tomorrow), 
needing 28.6 MT to meet the 74.9 MT inventory target. 
Poultry Sol Broiler Starter has a target of Mar 22 with a 
gap of 248.6 MT. 8 products including Elite XP Startex and 
Classic Hog Growex are unlikely to meet targets within 10 
days — production should start as early as possible. Salto 
Baby Stag and Gall 21 Chicken Layer have sufficient stock 
and can be deprioritized. 15 of 20 products match existing 
SAP orders.
```

**Product references in the narrative:**
- Product names: semi-bold (#374151), dotted underline (#d1d5db).
- On hover: orange (#fd5108), solid underline, cursor pointer.
- On click: scrolls to that product row in the Stock Level Preview table below, briefly highlights the row (yellow flash, 2 seconds).

---

### NOT COLLAPSIBLE

- The section is ALWAYS visible — it cannot be collapsed.
- No chevron icon.
- No collapse toggle.
- It is a static card, always open.

---

### AUTO-GENERATED

The AI insights generate AUTOMATICALLY — no manual trigger needed.

**Auto-generate triggers:**
1. When a Next 10 Days file is uploaded → generates immediately after parsing.
2. When the user navigates to the Next 10 Days page → if a file was previously uploaded, show cached insights.
3. When the user clicks "Refresh" → re-generates fresh insights.

**Loading state:**
- Replace insight text with "Analyzing stock levels..." in grey (#9ca3af) italic, with a subtle spinner.
- Duration: typically 1-3 seconds.

**Caching:**
- If cached insights exist from a previous generation (less than 5 minutes old), show cached version immediately without re-generating.
- If data changes (new file uploaded), always re-generate fresh.

**Error state:**
- If generation fails: "Unable to generate insights. Click Refresh to try again." in grey (#9ca3af) italic.

---

### REFRESH BUTTON BEHAVIOR

- On click: re-generates the AI insights based on current stock data.
- Brief loading state replaces the insight text.
- New insights replace old ones with smooth fade transition (~200ms).
- Button shows subtle rotation animation on the ↻ icon while generating.

---

### EMPTY STATE (NO FILE UPLOADED)

When no Next 10 Days file has been uploaded:

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ✨ AI Stock Insights                                        │
│                                                              │
│  Upload a Next 10 Days file to generate stock insights.      │
│                                                              │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- Same light orange background (#fff7ed).
- Same border (#fed7aa).
- Grey text (#9ca3af), 12px, italic.
- Refresh button hidden when no data.
```
